title: The Godfather Part II
posterAlt: The Godfather Part II (1974) movie poster
tmdbOverview: In the continuing saga of the Corleone crime family, a young Vito Corleone grows up in Sicily and in 1910s New York. In the 1950s, Michael Corleone attempts to expand the family business into Las Vegas, Hollywood and Cuba.
synopsis: The Godfather Part II (1974) is a drama and crime film from United States. It's highly rated, holding a strong 9.0 on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 1970s and genre rankings. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
